name: hve-psa-walkthrough
description: Guided onboarding walkthrough for Partner Solutions Architects using HVE Core

walkthroughs.title: Get Started as a Partner Solutions Architect
walkthroughs.description: Seven focused steps to get productive with HVE Core: configure your context, research topics, create diagrams, document decisions, demo to partners, deploy infrastructure, and review security.

steps.title: Set Your Context Once
steps.description:
Start by describing your current partner engagement. This context threads through all 7 steps so every prompt is tailored to your scenario.

[Set Partner Context](command:hve-psa.setPartnerContext)

Then tell Copilot who you are so every future interaction is grounded in your role.

[Set Your Context](command:hve-psa.step.memory)

steps.title: Prep for a Partner Call
steps.description:
Get a structured technical briefing on any Azure AI topic before a partner call. The Researcher subagent searches docs, repos, and web sources to produce a concise briefing in 2 minutes instead of 30.

[Research a Topic](command:hve-psa.step.researcher)

steps.title: Turn Your Whiteboard into a Diagram
steps.description:
Describe a partner's architecture in plain English and get a professional Mermaid diagram you can share in docs or presentations.

[Create a Diagram](command:hve-psa.step.archDiagram)

steps.title: Document Architecture Decisions
steps.description:
Turn an architecture decision into a formal Architecture Decision Record (ADR) without writing one from scratch. Capture the context, options considered, and rationale.

[Create an ADR](command:hve-psa.step.adr)

steps.title: Build a Partner Demo Dashboard
steps.description:
Generate a runnable Streamlit demo dashboard from a plain English description. Show partners a working prototype in minutes.

[Build a Dashboard](command:hve-psa.step.dashboard)

steps.title: Scaffold Azure Resources as Code
steps.description:
Describe the Azure resources your partner needs and get deployable Bicep or Terraform code. The IaC Generator handles resource dependencies, naming, and best practices.

[Generate IaC](command:hve-psa.step.iac)

steps.title: Review Code for Security
steps.description:
Run a security-focused review of partner code before production. Catches OWASP Top 10 risks, secrets in code, and AI-specific vulnerabilities like prompt injection.

[Run Security Review](command:hve-psa.step.security)
